classificationDefinitions.ReuseCandidate: SourceOfTruth or headless invariant mapping exists; retain as a starting point, not Verified.
classificationDefinitions.VerifiedCandidateNeedsTest: Useful verification/test harness candidate; tests are inventoried but not executed in TRUST-001.
classificationDefinitions.PartialNeedsWork: Source mapping exists, but known gaps or FND blockers require additional foundation work.
classificationDefinitions.StaleOrWrongMapping: Mapping appears stale or contradictory. No items were automatically assigned in this pass.
classificationDefinitions.BlockedByFoundation: Blocked by OpenCodeReady=false, FND-001/FND-002/FND-003, or full-card parity NotRun.
classificationDefinitions.BlockedByDataPolicy: Needs CardBaseEntity/data-policy decision before reuse can be trusted.
classificationDefinitions.DeleteCandidate: Generated build artifact or non-source file under src; candidate for cleanup policy, not deleted here.
classificationDefinitions.ManualReview: No strong automatic SourceOfTruth mapping; requires human review.
